red_lines: Foreign military presence in South China Sea
Interference in Hong Kong or Xinjiang
core_narratives: Century of humiliation must never repeat
Socialism with Chinese characteristics for a new era

decision_history.event_description: US imposed 145% tariffs on Chinese goods in April 2025
decision_history.decision_taken: Imposed retaliatory 125% tariffs on US goods, restricted rare earth exports, allowed yuan to weaken moderately
decision_history.outcome: Escalated trade war, accelerated decoupling, sought alternative trade partners

decision_history.event_description: Increased military pressure around Taiwan Strait
decision_history.decision_taken: Conducted large-scale military exercises, increased air and naval patrols near Taiwan
decision_history.outcome: Raised tensions but maintained ambiguity on timeline for reunification

cultural_context.domestic_power_base: Chinese Communist Party apparatus, military, state-owned enterprises

military_posture.force_disposition: regional dominance posture with expanding blue-water capability

recent_events: Belt and Road expansion in Southeast Asia
